caption:
Men's looks of the week!

This week's men's look belongs to the wanderers — those who move through the world with intention but without a fixed itinerary. Layers of raw texture, washed-out tones and sculptural silhouettes that feel like they've already lived a few good stories. Swipe through and let the fabrics do the talking.

Hooded jacket, knit top & shorts: @la_haine_inside_us
Bag: @tormentina_project
Striped linen vest & trousers: @lurdesbergada_syngmancucala
Hat: Kangol
